name: GitHub
description: Interact with GitHub issues and comments via the REST API
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The GitHub API action to perform.

owner.label: Owner
owner.description: Repository owner (user or org). Used by: all actions.

repo.label: Repository
repo.description: Repository name. Used by: all actions.

issueNumber.label: Issue Number
issueNumber.description: Issue number. Used by: Get Issue, Create Comment.

title.label: Title
title.description: Issue title. Used by: Create Issue.

body.label: Body
body.description: Issue body (Markdown). Used by: Create Issue.

labels.label: Labels
labels.description: Array of label names. Used by: Create Issue.

assignees.label: Assignees
assignees.description: Array of GitHub usernames. Used by: Create Issue.

commentBody.label: Comment Body
commentBody.description: Comment text (Markdown). Used by: Create Comment.

state.label: State
state.description: Filter issues by state. Used by: List Repo Issues.
